name: kernel_r0_r1_v0_2
purpose: Formal specification of the kernel transition from raw perturbation state r0 to reconciled initial state r1.
kernel_statement: The kernel of the system is the transition r0 -> r1.

input_state.name: r0
input_state.description: Raw perturbation state before resolved localization and reconciliation.

spark.description: Spark event serving as the minimal perturbation primitive.

output_state.name: r1
output_state.description: First resolved state after localization, centroid orientation, and reconciliation.

centroid_orientation.description: Orientation of the cube centroid relative to the localized spark.

map.name: Kernel
map.description: Resolve a raw spark into a reconciled centroid-oriented initial state.

interpretation.r1: localized spark, oriented centroid, reconciled state, seeded grammar

canonical_sentence: The kernel is the map from raw perturbation to reconciled centroid-oriented initial state.
